definitions: a line of descent; a sequence of generations

examples.text: They split into many families and lineages, evolving further or disappearing again.
examples.explanation: 这里的“lineages”指生物演化中的谱系或血统分支，即一系列连续的世代。

reviewSessions.example_text: They split into many families and lineages evolving further or disappearing again.
expected_definitions: a line of descent; a sequence of generations
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了“世系/谱系、血统沿袭”的核心含义，也符合例句中的生物进化分支语境。
matched_points: 对应世代延续/血统传承的含义
